target.description: Solve a tiny ECDLP-shaped challenge of up to 1 reference curve bits.
target.hint: recover d with Q = dG on y² = x³ + 1x + 2 over F_5 (any d with dG = Q verifies)
target.public_key_model: Q = dG over a deliberately tiny educational curve
target.win_condition: recover d and submit a classically verifiable proof
